dpt_result: ACCEPT — No relevant indications on any of 32 weld faces (16 stiffeners x 2 sides)
indication_observation_note: No linear indications. No rounded indications > 1.5mm. Two cosmetic spot indications < 1mm at stiffeners S-08 and S-14 (within ASME V Art 6 acceptance, not rejectable).
dpt_clearance_to_007c: Cleared — DPT acceptance feeds gate to FRM-U2-007C post-weld drilling for MC-C1 base plate anchor holes.
